changelog: Moods & Themes is now ready for hot-patched expansion. Themes can be added in a new `themes_pack.json` (bundled in the APK + hot-patched from https://hushtv.xyz/themes_pack.json) without needing an APK build. v1.44.54 ships with the 26-row populated pack v2 bundled.
Themed-detail back-press: scroll position and focused poster are now preserved when you back out of a movie. The grid stays exactly where you left it instead of jumping back to the top.
Pack-driven themes auto-merge with the 25 hand-curated themes. Slug collisions defer to the hand-curation (richer altTitles + per-title year disambiguation).
